  "findings": [
    "Phase tape colors do not comply with NEC 210.5 identification requirements.",
    "Incorrect phase identification can lead to miswiring and safety hazards."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-identify conductors with correct phase tape colors per NEC 210.5.",
    "Verify all branch circuit and feeder conductor identifications before proceeding."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 210.5 requires branch circuit conductors to be identified by color or other approved means. Incorrect phase tape colors constitute a non-compliant and defective installation, which must be corrected before the work can be accepted.",
  "references": ["NEC 210.5", "NEC 200.6"]
}
